thread.title: Grateful Migrant: 'To Hell With You, F*ck You—We Will Travel to Our Countries After We Destroy Sweden' (Video)
thread.title_full: Grateful Migrant: 'To Hell With You, F*ck You—We Will Travel to Our Countries After We Destroy Sweden' (Video)

author: Amy Mek
title: Grateful Migrant: 'To Hell With You, F*ck You—We Will Travel to Our Countries After We Destroy Sweden' (Video)
text:
A shocking video featuring an Islamic refugee in Sweden has ignited fresh demands for the country to halt Islamic immigration. In the footage, the individual unleashes a tirade against Sweden, wishing extreme suffering on citizens who voted for the current government. The speaker openly declared intentions to “destroy Sweden” before returning to their homeland and even suggested that Russia might turn Sweden into “a parking lot.”
Further fueling public outrage, the sharia-adherent Islamic migrant proudly admits she relies on taxpayer-funded interpreters and has no interest in integrating into Swedish society. In the video, she openly states that she came to Sweden not to build a life but explicitly to harm the country.
The incident has reignited debates over integration, national security, and immigration policies. Critics argue that such rhetoric exposes the failure of Sweden’s current approach to immigration, particularly concerning Islamic groups. The video has intensified calls for stricter immigration controls and stronger measures to preserve Sweden’s cultural and social stability.
